impact: The daemon will now reject the specific malformed Python constructs seen in recent failed rounds before broader validation, with compact diagnostics that point the worker toward a small syntax-valid retry instead of repeating the same domain-task failure.
summary: Add syntax-first PP&D preflight diagnostics for recurring malformed Python proposal patterns.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 5 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
